title: Trivy, KICS, and the shape of supply chain attacks so far in 2026 | Docker
description: We caught a malicious image pushed to checkmarx/kics on Docker Hub, the image was quarantined, and we coordinated response with Socket and Checkmarx. This blog walks through what happened and why we believe open, fast collaboration is the key to responding to this new pattern of emerging supply chain attacks.

description: We're coming up on a year since launching Docker Hardened Images (DHI) this May, and in this blog we celebrate the milestones, talk about our approach, and look at some practices in the industry.

title: Defending Your Software Supply Chain: What Every Engineering Team Should Do Now | Docker
description: The latest supply chain attack wave is not a single incident to respond to. It is a permanent shift in the threat landscape. In this blog by the Docker CISO Mark Lechner, we share the recommended best practice we use to protect ourselves.
